name: Canvas Assistant
description: Connects to Canvas coursework, grades, announcements, modules, and pages

auth.instructions: Generate a Canvas access token in Canvas under Settings > Approved Integrations > New Access Token.

tools.name: get_courses
tools.description: List Canvas courses available to the student.

tools.name: get_coursework
tools.description: List coursework items across Canvas courses.

tools.name: get_coursework_detail
tools.description: Fetch detailed information for a single coursework item.

tools.name: sync_now
tools.description: Trigger an immediate Canvas refresh read.

author: student-claw
